title: Progress tracking library with output formatters and CLI
body:
## Context

Build a progress tracking library that exposes formatted output in multiple styles and a CLI wrapper.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Library exports `formatProgress(complete, total)` with default style.
- [ ] Overflowing values are clamped to 100%.
- [ ] CLI wrapper accepts two integer arguments and prints formatted output.
- [ ] All modules are CommonJS, no external dependencies.
- [ ] `npm test` and `npm run build` pass.

title: Add formatted progress output with multiple styles
body:
## Context

The target repo only exposes a numeric `percent()` helper right now.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `src/progress.js` exports `formatProgress(complete, total)`.
- [ ] `formatProgress(2, 5)` returns `"2/5 complete (40%)"`.
- [ ] `test/progress.test.js` covers the new formatter.
- [ ] Keep the implementation in CommonJS and use only built-in Node.js modules.

title: Clamp overflowing progress values
body:
## Context

The formatter should stay predictable even when `complete` is greater than `total`.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Progress values are clamped so they never report more than 100%.
- [ ] `percent(7, 5)` returns `100`.
- [ ] `formatProgress(7, 5)` returns `"5/5 complete (100%)"`.
- [ ] Add or update tests in `test/progress.test.js`.

title: Add a CLI wrapper for progress output
body:
## Context

After the formatter is stable, expose it through a tiny CLI.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Add `src/cli.js` that prints the formatted progress for two integer arguments.
- [ ] Add tests for the CLI success path using built-in Node.js modules only.
- [ ] Keep `npm test` and `npm run build` green.
